mainEntity.name: What to Do When AI Models Recommend Your Competitors Instead
mainEntity.text: What to Do When AI Models Recommend Your Competitors Instead

acceptedAnswer.text: Can a lawyer actually influence AI search results? Absolutely. It’s about feeding the model the right data in the right way. You need consistent, authoritative mentions across the web and a website that speaks 'AI language.' If you aren't seeing your name in the summary box, your digital footprint needs an upgrade. We specialize in making firms AI-ready. Give us a call to see how it works.
